description: Registry of destructive/sensitive actions requiring explicit confirmation. Agents check this before executing matching operations. Injected into each agent's workspace at deploy time as .dangerous-actions.json.

confirmation_levels.explicit: Agent asks 'Are you sure you want to [action]?' and waits for yes/confirm before proceeding
confirmation_levels.double: Agent states exact consequences, asks user to reply with the confirmation phrase 'CONFIRM [ACTION]', then asks once more before proceeding

dangerous_actions.consequence: Issue and all comments/attachments will be permanently deleted

dangerous_actions.description: Transition multiple Jira issues at once (3+ issues)
dangerous_actions.consequence: Multiple issues will change status simultaneously

dangerous_actions.description: Move issues between sprints or modify sprint scope
dangerous_actions.consequence: Sprint scope and planning will be affected
Ticket and all customer correspondence will be permanently deleted

dangerous_actions.description: Update multiple Zendesk tickets at once (3+ tickets)
dangerous_actions.consequence: Multiple customer tickets will be modified simultaneously
Merged tickets cannot be unmerged; customer history will be combined

dangerous_actions.description: Send a public reply to a customer on a Zendesk ticket
dangerous_actions.consequence: Customer will receive this message directly via email
Branch and any unmerged commits will be lost
Remote branch history will be rewritten; other developers may lose work
Code will be merged into the target branch

dangerous_actions.description: Close a GitHub issue or PR without merging
dangerous_actions.consequence: Issue/PR will be closed and removed from active tracking

dangerous_actions.description: Delete a Notion page or database
dangerous_actions.consequence: Page and all sub-pages will be moved to trash

dangerous_actions.description: Edit multiple Notion pages at once (3+ pages)
dangerous_actions.consequence: Multiple knowledge base pages will be modified simultaneously

dangerous_actions.description: Delete a Zoho CRM record (contact, deal, account)
dangerous_actions.consequence: CRM record and associated data will be permanently deleted

dangerous_actions.description: Bulk update Zoho CRM records (3+ records)
dangerous_actions.consequence: Multiple CRM records will be modified simultaneously

dangerous_actions.description: Change deal stages or pipeline configuration
dangerous_actions.consequence: Sales pipeline structure will be changed for all users
